import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const features = [ { icon: '⛳', title: 'Track Your Game', desc: 'Log your Stableford scores and watch your performance over time.' }, { icon: '🎲', title: 'Monthly Draws', desc: 'Your scores enter monthly draws. Match numbers to win exciting prizes.' }, { icon: '💚', title: 'Real Impact', desc: 'Every subscription contributes to a charity of your choice. Golf meets generosity.' }, { icon: '🏆', title: 'Win & Give', desc: 'Celebrate victories knowing your participation supports meaningful causes.' }, ]; const tiers = [ { name: 'Bronze', matches: '3 matches', color: 'text-amber-600', bg: 'bg-amber-900/20 border-amber-700/30', desc: 'You\'re on the board!' }, { name: 'Silver', matches: '4 matches', color: 'text-charcoal-300', bg: 'bg-charcoal-700/30 border-charcoal-600/30', desc: 'Outstanding performance!' }, { name: 'Gold', matches: '5 matches', color: 'text-gold-400', bg: 'bg-gold-900/30 border-gold-700/30', desc: 'The ultimate win!' }, ]; const audienceRoles = [ { title: 'Public Visitor', items: [ 'View platform concept', 'Explore listed charities', 'Understand draw mechanics', 'Initiate subscription', ], }, { title: 'Registered Subscriber', items: [ 'Manage profile & settings', 'Enter / edit golf scores', 'Select charity recipient', 'View participation & winnings', 'Upload winner proof', ], }, { title: 'Administrator', items: [ 'Manage users & subscriptions', 'Configure & run draws', 'Manage charity listings', 'Verify winners & payouts', 'Access reports & analytics', ], }, ]; const scoreRules = { inputRequirements: [ 'Users must enter their last 5 golf scores', 'Score range: 1 - 45 (Stableford format)', 'Each score must include a date', ], functionalBehaviour: [ 'Only the latest 5 scores are retained at any time', 'A new score replaces the oldest stored score automatically', 'Scores are displayed in reverse chronological order (most recent first)', ], }; export default function LandingPage() { return (
